---
title: "In-class-template"
author: "Maisie Prestridge"
format: pdf
---

# 1. Set up

## Packages

```{r}

# general use and cleaning
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(janitor)
library(snakecase)

# wrap axis labels
library(scales)

# reading .xlsx files 
library(readxl)

# visualise missing data 
library(naniar)

# arrange plots
library(patchwork)
```

## Data

```{r}
#| label: data

taxon_list <- read_csv(here("data", "taxon_list.csv"))

```
